mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_monitor_jvm_log (id, heap_used, heap_max, heap_committed, thread_count, peak_thread_count, class_loaded_count, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{heapUsed}, #{heapMax}, #{heapCommitted}, #{threadCount}, #{peakThreadCount}, #{classLoadedCount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, heap_used AS heapUsed, heap_max AS heapMax, heap_committed AS heapCommitted, thread_count AS threadCount, peak_thread_count AS peakThreadCount, class_loaded_count AS classLoadedCount, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_monitor_jvm_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
